subcodes.first_line: Say: O My City, grieve not for that which hath befallen thee from those who disdained the worship of thy Lord and turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا مدینتی لاتحزنی عما ورد علیک من الذین استنکفوا عن عباده ربک و اعرضوا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @pioneering; travel teaching
